content:
# Session 44 — summary

## NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (8th consecutive)
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{type: summary, no_prover_lane: true, iter: 44}`. `prover.jsonl` empty.
- `sync_leanok` iter=44 sha=`cd9615a` +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9`;
  `git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty. No `.lean` edit since iter-036 ⇒ no regression possible.
- No closable in-cone sorry exists. Re-confirmed via `grep -rln sorry AlgebraicJacobian/`: only
  `Picard/QuotScheme.lean` (4 typed χ, L126/165/201/228) + `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean` hold typed
  sorries — both out-of-leg. The sole `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` hit is a comment
  ("…no proof exists without `sorryAx`"), NOT a typed sorry — file is sorry-free.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L
`GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE. No live frontier.

## No-dispatch is correct
Re-weighed and declined all options exactly as iters 037–043: re-probe χ (cohomology/Snapper-gated),
open cohomology megaleg (overreach; critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened), split done file
(busywork; split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems — this leg has none), name/repoint
anonymous-instance pins (net-negative; manufactures merge conflicts the reconciliation must undo).

## Blueprint doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
`logs/iter-044/blueprint-doctor.md`: dormant inherited chapters only — `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`
(2 phantom covers for non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 13 broken `\ref`),
`Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). No prover near
them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Merge-time per Archon memory.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` file modified this iter (`git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty); prior
  verdict (iter-036) had no live must-fix. Both skip conditions met.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` files received prover work this iter (no edits to verify).
